examples.title: Using fchdir() System Call
examples.description: Example demonstrating fchdir() to change to a directory using file descriptor
examples.explanation: Opens /tmp directory, then uses fchdir() to change working directory to it. The file descriptor must refer to a directory.

examples.title: Using getcwd() System Call
examples.description: Example demonstrating getcwd() to retrieve current working directory
examples.explanation: getcwd() stores the absolute path of current working directory in the provided buffer. PATH_MAX ensures sufficient buffer size.

examples.title: Creating Device File with mknod()
examples.description: Example demonstrating mknod() to create a device special file
examples.explanation: mknod() creates a special file. S_IFBLK indicates block device, 0660 is permissions, makedev() combines major and minor numbers.

examples.title: Checking Device Type using stat()
examples.description: Example demonstrating how to check if a file is a device and identify its type
examples.explanation: stat() fills the stat structure. S_ISBLK and S_ISCHR macros test file type. major() and minor() extract device numbers from st_rdev.
